Package jline.solvers.ssa.events

Class SynchedEvent

  • java.lang.Object
    • jline.solvers.ssa.events.Event
      • jline.solvers.ssa.events.SynchedEvent
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ForkEvent, JoinEvent
    public class SynchedEvent
extends Event
